mapper.select: SELECT * FROM audit_object_unit WHERE 1=1 AND (unit_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%') OR unit_id LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%')) AND category = #{category} ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO audit_object_unit (unit_id, unit_code, unit_name, category, category_name, establishment_count, fund_scale, leader_in_charge, leader_in_charge_phone, finance_contact, finance_contact_phone, address, setup_date, total_audit_count, latest_audit_date, pending_rectify_count) VALUES (#{unitId}, #{unitCode}, #{unitName}, #{category}, #{categoryName}, #{establishmentCount}, #{fundScale}, #{leaderInCharge}, #{leaderInChargePhone}, #{financeContact}, #{financeContactPhone}, #{address}, #{setupDate}, #{totalAuditCount}, #{latestAuditDate}, #{pendingRectifyCount})
mapper.update: UPDATE audit_object_unit SET unit_name=#{unitName}, category=#{category}, establishment_count=#{establishmentCount}, fund_scale=#{fundScale}, leader_in_charge=#{leaderInCharge}, leader_in_charge_phone=#{leaderInChargePhone}, finance_contact=#{financeContact}, finance_contact_phone=#{financeContactPhone}, unit_name=#{unitName} WHERE unit_id=#{unitId}
UPDATE audit_object_unit SET total_audit_count=IFNULL(total_audit_count,0)+1, latest_audit_date=NOW(), pending_rectify_count=#{pending} WHERE unit_id=#{unitId}
UPDATE audit_object_unit SET total_audit_count=IFNULL(total_audit_count,0)+1, latest_audit_date=NOW() WHERE unit_id=#{unitId}
UPDATE audit_object_unit SET latest_audit_date=NOW() WHERE unit_id=#{unitId}
mapper.select: SELECT leader_name FROM audit_object_leader WHERE current_unit_name=#{unitName} AND is_active=1
SELECT leader_name, phone FROM audit_object_leader WHERE phone IS NOT NULL
